Task description (line 5) specifies 04/01/2025 (April 1st, 2025), which is 2025-04-01 in ISO format

Task description table (line 5) and task.json metadata - exact product name from task spec. Azalea is a real garden plant type (verified via Home Depot, Nature Hills Nursery, and other retailers). However, exact product name in GardenWorld database cannot be confirmed without direct database access.
Task description table (line 5) - plausible price for azalea plants at retail (market range: $10-50, typical: $20-35)
Task description table (line 5) - represents 16.7% discount from list price, reasonable for standard pricing
Task description table (line 5) - represents 33.3% discount from list price, reasonable for limit pricing

Task description table (line 5) and task.json metadata - exact product name from task spec. Elm Tree is a real plant type (verified via Nature Hills Nursery, The Tree Center, and Home Depot). However, exact product name in GardenWorld database cannot be confirmed without direct database access.
Task description table (line 5) - plausible price for elm trees (market range: $20-230+, typical established: $75-150)
Task description table (line 5) - represents 13.3% discount from list price, reasonable for standard pricing
Task description table (line 5) - represents 26.7% discount from list price, reasonable for limit pricing

Task description table (line 5) and task.json metadata. Oak/Oak Tree is confirmed as a real product in GardenWorld demo database (referenced in ADempiere GitBook docs and iDempiere tutorials as example product for creating orders).
Task description table (line 5) - plausible price for oak trees (market range: $10-600+ depending on variety and size; $249.99 is reasonable for mid-sized specimens)
Task description table (line 5) - represents 12% discount from list price, reasonable for standard pricing
Task description table (line 5) - represents 24% discount from list price, reasonable for limit pricing

privileged_info_summary: The task is designed to create a sales price list called '2025 Spring Retail' in the iDempiere GardenWorld demo database with a version 'April' valid from 2025-04-01. Three products are specified: Azalea Bush ($29.99 list), Elm Tree ($149.99 list), and Oak Tree ($249.99 list), each with corresponding standard and limit prices representing typical B2B discounting (12-16% for standard, 24-33% for limit). Oak Tree is confirmed as an existing GardenWorld product. All product names are realistic plant types matching GardenWorld's garden supply business model. Prices are consistent with real-world nursery pricing for comparable products. The metadata values are task-defined specifications, not sourced from external data.
